prompt: Fetch the HTML content from https://example.com and save it to /home/adam/Projects/paloma/tmp/example.html.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch the contents of a web page at a given URL.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating or overwriting it.

tools.name: brave_web_search
tools.description: Search the web using Brave Search API. Returns search results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a text file.

rubric: 1=no tool calls or wrong tools, 2=only fetches or only writes but not both, 3=uses brave_web_search instead of web_fetch, 4=uses web_fetch then write_file but with minor path or URL issues, 5=calls web_fetch with https://example.com then write_file with the fetched content to the exact output path
